info.title: Nonconformance
info.description: In a manufacturing process, product defects are often found as part of quality checks. Use this service to log nonconformances for product defects, retrieve logged nonconformances and to disposition nonconformance SFCs.

regionHost.description: The data center where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization.

tokenHost.description: The authentication token server where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization.

post.description: Logs a nonconformance for SFCs at a given operation for a given plant.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

post.description: Check for open nonconformance by the given SFCs.

200.description: There is no open nonconformance for given SFCs.

400.description: There are two cases: 1. An open nonconformance was found. See the error message with the list of open nonconformances. 2. The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

get.description: Retrieves a nonconformance list for a given plant by various optional parameters.

parameters.name: operationActivity
parameters.description: The operation activity with the current version to search for nonconformances.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: The plant to search for nonconformances.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The resource to search for nonconformances.

parameters.name: routing
parameters.description: The routing with the current version to search for nonconformances.

parameters.name: routingStepId
parameters.description: The routing step to search for nonconformances.

parameters.name: sfc
parameters.description: The SFC to search for nonconformances.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: The date and time to only show nonconformances logged after or at the given time stamp in UTC.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: The date and time to only show nonconformances logged before or at the given time stamp in UTC.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

get.summary: Retrieves a list of nonconformance hierarchies.
get.description: Retrieves a list of nonconformance hierarchies by plant and SFC.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: The plant to search for nonconformance hierarchies.

parameters.name: sfc
parameters.description: The SFC to search for nonconformance hierarchies.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

post.summary: Route nonconformant SFCs based on disposition settings.
post.description: Performs the disposition of nonconformant SFCs at a given resource. A nonconformance incident has a nonconformance code with associated disposition routings. If there are several options for the disposition like several disposition routings in the NC code, a service returns DispositionOption objects for the selection. To select an option for the disposition of the SFC this API must be called again with the selected options. Note that you can use the ReturnStepId field only with the RETURN_TO_ANY and RETURN_TO_ANY_PREVIOUS disposition options. These options allow you to select a specific routing step.

200.description: Disposition of the nonconformant SFCs is successful.

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

409.description: The nonconformant SFC has to be dispositioned to available routes.

get.description: Retrieves a list of nonconformances for a given plant by various optional parameters.

parameters.name: operationActivity
parameters.description: The operation activity with the current version to search for nonconformances.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: The plant to search for nonconformances.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The resource to search for nonconformances.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the nonconformance incident.

parameters.name: routing
parameters.description: The routing with the current version to search for nonconformances.

parameters.name: routingStepId
parameters.description: The routing step to search for nonconformances.

parameters.name: sfc
parameters.description: The SFC to search for nonconformances.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: The date and time to only show nonconformances logged after or at the given time stamp in UTC.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: The date and time to only show nonconformances logged before or at the given time stamp in UTC.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page of nonconformances. By default,  the system returns the first page.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the nonconformance page. By default, the page size is 20 records. The maximum page size is 1000.)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The retrieved records can be sorted using one or more of the following fields: 'id', 'state', 'createdDateTime'. Example: 'https://xxx?xxxx&sort=id,desc&sort=createdDateTime,desc' (By default the result sorted by logged date)

400.description: The HTTP request is bad or invalid and cannot be processed by the server.

401.description: You are not authorized to call this resource.

403.description: Accessing the resource you are trying to reach is forbidden.

404.description: One of the related elements is not found.

DataField.title: DataField

value.description: The value of the data field.

DataField.description: Name/value pair to be collected as part of logging a Non Conformance.

fileMediaType.description: The file media type, for example, 'text/xml'.

LogNonConformanceRequest.title: LogNonConformanceRequest

code.description: The nonconformance code to log a nonconformance.

dataFields.description: The data field/value pairs associated with the nonconformance.

files.description: The collection of files to be stored with the nonconformance.

plant.description: The plant to log a nonconformance.

resource.description: The resource to log a nonconformance.

sfcs.description: The SFC to log a nonconformance.

processLotNumber.description: The process lot to log nonconformance codes for the SFCs belonging to it.

workCenter.description: The work center to log a nonconformance.

primaryNonConformanceId.description: The primary nonconformance record for logging a secondary nonconformance code.

routingStepId.description: The routing step on the relaxed routing where the nonconformance was logged.

startSfcRequired.description: Indicates if the SFC start is required when a nonconformance is logged. True, if it is not specified

allowNotAssembledComponents.description: Indicates that the system needs to validate that components are assembled when logging a nonconformance. If it is set to True, the system does not require any validation.

LogNonConformanceRequest.description: The request to log a nonconformance.

NonConformanceLogResponse.title: NonConformanceLogResponse

ids.description: The list of logged nonconformance incidents for SFCs.

NonConformanceLogResponse.description: The response for the logged nonconformances.

SfcNonconformances.title: SfcNonconformances

ids.description: The list of logged nonconformance incidents for the SFC.

SfcNonconformances.description: The list of logged nonconformance incidents for the SFC.

CheckOpenNonConformancesRequest.title: CheckOpenNonConformancesRequest

sfcs.description: The SFC to check for open nonconformances.

bomLevel.description: Bom level to search for open nonconformances.

plant.description: The plant in which nonconformances are checked.

CheckOpenNonConformancesRequest.description: The request to check for open nonconformances.

OpenNonConformanceRequest.title: OpenNonConformanceRequest

id.description: The incident ID reference for reopening a nonconformance incident.

plant.description: The plant in which state is changed.

comments.description: The comments for opening a nonconformance incident.

OpenNonConformanceRequest.description: The request to change state to open for nonconformance.

CloseNonConformanceRequest.title: CloseNonConformanceRequest

id.description: The incident ID reference for closing a nonconformance incident.

plant.description: The plant in which state is changed.

comments.description: The comments for closing a nonconformance incident.

CloseNonConformanceRequest.description: The primary nonconformance record for logging a secondary nonconformance code.

dataFields.description: The data field/value pairs associated with the nonconformance.

parentNcIncident.description: The ID of the parent nonconformance incident.

dataFields.description: The data field/value pairs associated with the nonconformance.

offset.description: Returns the nonconformance incidents according to the pageNumber and pageSize you set

pageNumber.description: Indicates the page from which the nonconformance incidents are retrieved.

pageSize.description: Specifies the number of records on one page.

paged.description: If set to 'true', retrieves the nonconformance incidents based on the properties you set in Pageable. If set to 'false', all nonconformance incidents are retrieved.

sort.description: Defines how the nonconformance incidents records are sorted.

unpaged.description: Indicates if the nonconformance incidents are retrieved based on the properties you set in Pageable, or they are all retrieved. The value of this field is automatically filled.

empty.description: If the value is 'true', it indicates that no nonconformance incident is retrieved. If the value is 'false', it indicates that there are nonconformance incidents retrieved.

sorted.description: If the value is 'true', it indicates that the nonconformance incidents retrieved are sorted accordingly. If the value is 'false', it indicates that no nonconformance incidents are retrieved.

unsorted.description: If the value is 'false', it indicates that the nonconformance incidents retrieved are sorted accordingly. If the value is 'true', it indicates that no nonconformance incidents are retrieved.

empty.description: Returns true if the result is empty.

first.description: If the value is 'true', it indicates that the current page is the first page.

last.description: If the value is 'true', it indicates that the current page is the last page.

numberOfElements.description: The number of nonconformance incidents on the current page.

sort.description: Defines how the nonconformance incidents records are sorted

totalElements.description: The total number of the retrieved nonconformance incidents.

totalPages.description: The total number of the returned pages.

SfcDisposition.title: SfcDisposition

operation.description: The operation activity at which the SFC was queued.

partialSfc.description: Indicates whether the remaining quantity was only partially scrapped.

qty.description: The quantity of the dispositioned SFC.

type.description: The type of the SFC disposition: DONE - SFC completed all routing steps, NO_DISPOSITION - SFC remains at the current operation, PARTIAL_COMPLETE - Partial quantity of the SFC completes the current operation, QUEUE - SFC placed in queue at the current operation, RETURN - SFC returns to the selected operation, SCRAP - SFC is scrapped.

SfcDisposition.description: The object describing a successful SFC disposition.

SfcDispositionRequest.title: SfcDispositionRequest

dateTime.description: The date and time for the SFC disposition.

plant.description: The plant where the nonconformant SFCs are dispositioned.

resource.description: The resource where the nonconformant SFCs are dispositioned.

sfcs.description: The list of SFCs that are nonconformant and need dispositioning.

workCenter.description: The work center where the nonconformant SFCs are dispositioned.

performAutoSplit.description: Indicates whether auto split must be performed when disposition is done for part of the SFC.

SfcDispositionRequest.description: The request for dispositioning nonconformant SFCs.

SfcDispositionResponse.title: SfcDispositionResponse

sfcDispositions.description: The list of successful SFC dispositions.

SfcDispositionResponse.description: The object describing successful SFC dispositions.

description.description: The description of an SFC disposition.

operation.description: The operation activity of the return step where nonconformant SFCs can be dispositioned.

operationVersion.description: The version of the operation activity of the return step where nonconformant SFCs can be dispositioned.

routing.description: The routing where nonconformant SFCs can be dispositioned.

routingType.description: The type of the routing where nonconformant SFCs can be dispositioned.

routingVersion.description: The version of the routing where nonconformant SFCs can be dispositioned.

stepId.description: The ID of the return step where nonconformant SFCs can be dispositioned.

options.description: The list of SFC disposition options.

type.description: The type of the SFC disposition: GROUP_MEMBER - Member of disposition group, ROUTING - Routing where an SFC could be dispositioned, ROUTING_STEP - Routing Step where an SFC could be placed, NEXT_STEP - possible next steps for an SFC, RETURN_STEP - possible return steps for an SFC, FUTURE_STEP - possible future steps an for SFC, SCRAP - SFC scrap.

DispositionSelection.title: DispositionSelection

returnStepId.description: The ID of the return step where nonconformant SFCs must be dispositioned.

routing.description: The routing where nonconformant SFCs must be dispositioned.

routingType.description: The type of the routing where nonconformant SFCs must be dispositioned.

routingVersion.description: The version of the routing where nonconformant SFCs must be dispositioned.

DispositionSelection.description: The object describing the kind of SFC disposition that was selected.

DispositionSelectionResponse.title: DispositionSelectionResponse

causeMessage.description: Contains a technical reason for the error.

DispositionSelectionResponse.description: The response containing SFC disposition options.
